fields.name: includedCheckedBagsOnly
fields.description: If true, returns the flight-offers with included checked bags only

fields.name: refundableFare
fields.description: If true, returns the flight-offers with refundable fares only

fields.name: noRestrictionFare
fields.description: If true, returns the flight-offers with no restriction fares only

fields.name: noPenaltyFare
fields.description: If true, returns the flight-offers with no penalty fares only
